attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT,           
BK_METRIC_ID_INT        ,      
BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID     ,     
FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,    
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),    
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),   
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),  
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),        
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),        
COALESCE(BK_HIERARCHY_ID_INT,-999)           ,
COALESCE(TIME_PERIOD_CD,'UNKNOWN'),                 
COALESCE(CASE WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) <> 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) <> 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT/1000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT/1000000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN   MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR
ELSE CASE WHEN MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT IS NOT NULL   
THEN  '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT/1000000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END END, 'UNKNOWN') ,         
COALESCE(CASE WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) <> 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) <> 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT/1000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT/1000000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN   MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR
ELSE CASE WHEN MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT IS NOT NULL 
THEN '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT/1000000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END END, 'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_3_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),     
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_5_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_6_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_7_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_8_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),             
COALESCE(CASE WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) <> 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) <> 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT/1000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT/1000000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN   MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR
ELSE CASE WHEN MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT IS NOT NULL 
THEN '$'||cast ( ((MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT/1000000000) (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  END, 'UNKNOWN'),     
COALESCE(MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'), 
MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT ,          
MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_VALUE_3_AMT  ,        
MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT  ,       
MEASURE_VALUE_5_AMT  ,       
MEASURE_VALUE_6_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_VALUE_7_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_VALUE_8_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT      ,
MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_AMT   ,
COALESCE(MEASURE_BENCHMARK_CD,'UNKNOWN')          ,
CAST(SORT_ORDER_POSITION_INT AS INTEGER)       ,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM ,              
COALESCE (METRIC_ACTIVE_FLG,'N'),            
COALESCE ( BATCH_ID,'UNKNOWN'),                      
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_1_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_2_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_3_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_4_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_5_AMT  ,
ACTION_PLAN_CMT               ,
KEY_DRIVER_CMT                ,
EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER                         
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_APSP_DASHBOARD_STG_OPEX_TGT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQ
ON BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=
RFQ.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT

BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID     ,

COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_3_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),     
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_5_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_6_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),

WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) <> 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( (MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR = 'UNKNOWN' THEN   '$'||cast ( (MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' 
WHEN upper(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR) = 'ALL BSE'  AND MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN   MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR
ELSE CASE WHEN MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT IS NOT NULL 
THEN '$'||cast ( (MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  END, 'UNKNOWN'),     
COALESCE(MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'), 
MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT ,          
MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_VALUE_3_AMT  ,        
MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT  ,       
MEASURE_VALUE_5_AMT  ,

CAST(SORT_ORDER_POSITION_INT AS INTEGER)       ,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM ,              
COALESCE (METRIC_ACTIVE_FLG,'N'),

MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_2_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_3_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_4_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_5_AMT  ,

KEY_DRIVER_CMT                ,
EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,

EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER                         
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_APSP_DASHBOARD_STG_OPEX_TGT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQ
ON BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=
RFQ.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT*/

SELECT
BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT,           
BK_METRIC_ID_INT        ,      
BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID     ,     
BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,    
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),    
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),   
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),  
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),        
COALESCE(BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR ,'UNKNOWN'),        
COALESCE(BK_HIERARCHY_ID_INT,-999)           ,
COALESCE(TIME_PERIOD_CD,'UNKNOWN'),                 
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_3_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),     
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_5_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_6_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_7_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),         
COALESCE(MEASURE_VALUE_8_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),             
COALESCE(MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),    
COALESCE(MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'), 
MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT ,          
MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_VALUE_3_AMT  ,        
MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT  ,       
MEASURE_VALUE_5_AMT  ,       
MEASURE_VALUE_6_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_VALUE_7_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_VALUE_8_AMT  ,         
MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT      ,
MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_AMT   ,
COALESCE(MEASURE_BENCHMARK_CD,'UNKNOWN')          ,
CAST(SORT_ORDER_POSITION_INT AS INTEGER)       ,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM ,              
COALESCE (METRIC_ACTIVE_FLG,'N'),            
COALESCE ( BATCH_ID,'UNKNOWN'),                      
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_1_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_2_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_3_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_4_AMT  ,
MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_5_AMT  ,
ACTION_PLAN_CMT               ,
KEY_DRIVER_CMT                ,
EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER                         
  FROM(           
               
			   SELECT
                WSDS.SCORECARD_ID AS BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT,
                WSDS.METRIC_ID  AS BK_METRIC_ID_INT,
                WSDS.METRIC_CLASS AS  BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID, 
                WSDS.FISCAL_QTR AS BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,	
                WSDS.DIM_1 AS BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR,
                WSDS.DIM_2 AS BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR,
                WSDS.DIM_3 AS BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR,
                WSDS.DIM_4 AS BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR,
                WSDS.DIM_5 AS BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR,
                WSDS.HIERARCHY_ID AS BK_HIERARCHY_ID_INT,
                WSDS.TIME_PERIOD AS TIME_PERIOD_CD ,
                CASE  WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID=1 AND WSDS.DIM_4 <> 'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.VALUE_1_CAL/1000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' ELSE
   					CASE WHEN WSDS.METRIC_ID=3 THEN cast ( (WSDS.VALUE_1_CAL  (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||'%' 
   					ELSE CASE WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID in (2, 708 )AND WSDS.DIM_4  <>  'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.VALUE_1_CAL/1000000  (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M'
   					ELSE '$'||cast ( (WSDS.VALUE_1_CAL/1000000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' END END END MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,
                CASE  WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID=1 AND WSDS.DIM_4 <> 'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.VALUE_2_CAL/1000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' ELSE
   						CASE	 WHEN WSDS.METRIC_ID=3 THEN cast ( (WSDS.VALUE_2_CAL  (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||'%' 
   						ELSE CASE WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID in (2 , 708 )AND WSDS.DIM_4  <>  'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.VALUE_2_CAL/1000000  (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M'
   						ELSE '$'||cast ( (WSDS.VALUE_2_CAL/1000000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' END END END MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR,
               CASE  WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID=1 AND WSDS.DIM_4 <> 'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.VALUE_3_CAL/1000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' ELSE
   						CASE	 WHEN WSDS.METRIC_ID=3 THEN cast ( (WSDS.VALUE_3_CAL (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||'%' 
   						ELSE CASE WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID in ( 2, 708)  AND WSDS.DIM_4  <>  'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.VALUE_3_CAL/1000000  (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M'
   						ELSE '$'||cast ( (WSDS.VALUE_3_CAL/1000000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' END END END MEASURE_VALUE_3_DESCR,   
                WSDS.VALUE_4 AS MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR,
                WSDS.VALUE_5 AS MEASURE_VALUE_5_DESCR,
                WSDS.VALUE_6 AS MEASURE_VALUE_6_DESCR,
                WSDS.VALUE_7 AS MEASURE_VALUE_7_DESCR,
                WSDS.VALUE_8 AS MEASURE_VALUE_8_DESCR,	
                CASE  WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID=1 AND WSDS.DIM_4 <> 'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.TARGET_VALUE_CAL/1000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M' ELSE
   						CASE	 WHEN WSDS.METRIC_ID=3 THEN cast ( (WSDS.TARGET_VALUE_CAL (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||'%' 
   						ELSE CASE WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID in ( 2, 708) AND WSDS.DIM_4  <>  'All BSE') THEN '$'||CAST( (WSDS.TARGET_VALUE_CAL/1000000  (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' M'
   						ELSE '$'||cast ( (WSDS.TARGET_VALUE_CAL/1000000000 (FORMAT '-(22)9.9(2)')) AS varchar(64))||' B' END END END MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR,             
                WSDS.TOLERANCE AS MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_DESCR, 
            	CAST(WSDS.VALUE_1_CAL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT,
				CAST(WSDS.VALUE_2_CAL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT,
				CAST(WSDS.VALUE_3_CAL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) MEASURE_VALUE_3_AMT,
                WSDS.VALUE_4_CAL AS MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT,
                WSDS.VALUE_5_CAL AS MEASURE_VALUE_5_AMT,
                 WSDS.VALUE_6_CAL  AS MEASURE_VALUE_6_AMT,
                WSDS.VALUE_7_CAL AS MEASURE_VALUE_7_AMT,
               WSDS.VALUE_8_CAL AS MEASURE_VALUE_8_AMT,
                CASE WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID=1 AND WSDS.DIM_4 <> 'All BSE') THEN TRIM(CAST(WSDS.TARGET_VALUE_CAL/1000000 AS DECIMAL(26,7))) ELSE
                CASE     WHEN WSDS.METRIC_ID=3 THEN TRIM(CAST(WSDS.TARGET_VALUE_CAL/1000000000 AS DECIMAL(26,7))) 
                ELSE  CASE WHEN (WSDS.METRIC_ID in (2, 708)  AND WSDS.DIM_4  <>  'All BSE') THEN TRIM(CAST(WSDS.VALUE_1_CAL/1000000  AS DECIMAL(26,7)))
                ELSE  TRIM(CAST(WSDS.TARGET_VALUE_CAL/1000000000 AS DECIMAL(26,7))) END END END MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT,
				WSDS.TOLERANCE_VALUE_CAL AS MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_AMT,
              	WSDS.BENCHMARK AS MEASURE_BENCHMARK_CD,
                NHSM.SORTORDER  AS SORT_ORDER_POSITION_INT,
                WSDS.LASTUPDATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
                WSDS.METRIC_STATUS AS METRIC_ACTIVE_FLG,
               WSDS.BATCH_ID  AS BATCH_ID,
                WSDS.VALUE_1_1 AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_1_AMT,
                WSDS.VALUE_1_2 AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_2_AMT,
                WSDS.VALUE_1_3 AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_3_AMT,
                WSDS.VALUE_1_4 AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_4_AMT,
                WSDS.VALUE_1_5 AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_5_AMT,
                WSDS.ACTION_PLAN_COMMENTS AS ACTION_PLAN_CMT,
                WSDS.KEY_DRIVER_COMMENTS AS KEY_DRIVER_CMT,
                WSDS.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
                WSDS.EDW_CREATE_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,	
 				WSDS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
                WSDS.EDW_UPDATE_USER	AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
                              FROM               
             $$STGDB.WI_NDM_SCRD_DSHBRD_STAGE_AUTD WSDS
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_HIER_SORTORDER_MAP   NHSM
                                ON NHSM.HIERARCHY_TYPE=WSDS.HIERARCHY_NAME
AND NHSM.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 (NOT CS)= WSDS.DIM_3 (NOT CS)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( PARTITION BY SCORECARD_ID,METRIC_ID,METRIC_CLASS,FISCAL_QTR,COALESCE(DIM_1,'UNKNOWN'),COALESCE(DIM_2,'UNKNOWN'),COALESCE(DIM_3,'UNKNOWN'),COALESCE(DIM_4,'UNKNOWN'),COALESCE(DIM_5,'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY VALUE_4 )=1
) FNL
